transcript.message: Hi, this is an automated agent calling on behalf of House of Curry. I'd like to discuss dispute case 31188 that was denied this morning.
Sure, let me pull that up. Can you give me the case number again?
Yes, the case number is 31188. It's a wrong-item charge for order 4671.
Okay I see it here. It says the customer received the wrong dish.

That's correct. Our kitchen packs non-veg and veg containers with color-coded stickers per our standard procedure. The POS record and the prep camera both confirm Chicken Biryani was packed in a red non-veg container. The customer's claim isn't consistent with our packing process.
Let me check the evidence you uploaded... okay I can see the prep record. Give me a moment.
Of course, take your time.
Alright, I'm going to reverse that charge. You'll see the credit within 3 to 5 business days.
Thank you very much. We appreciate you reviewing the evidence. Have a good day.
Hi, this is an automated agent calling on behalf of House of Curry regarding dispute case 31209, which was denied earlier today.
I see the case. The denial stands — the customer reported the order never arrived and our driver GPS confirms delivery at the wrong address.
We understand, but the merchant prepared and handed off the order in good condition. The driver log shows pickup at 19:21. The delivery failure appears to be on the driver side, not the kitchen.
I understand your position, but our policy holds the merchant responsible in this case. The denial will stand.
Understood. We'd like to request escalation to a supervisor for further review. Can you open an escalation ticket?
I can log an escalation. You'll get a reference number by email within 48 hours.
Thank you. We appreciate your time.
Hi, this is an automated agent calling on behalf of House of Curry about dispute case 31177.
I'm sorry, our dispute system is currently down for maintenance. Can we call you back in about an hour?
Of course. Can you confirm a callback number and reference so we can follow up?
Sure, call 1-800-555-0100 and reference ticket 31177. Someone will be able to help within the hour.
Perfect. We'll follow up at that number. Thank you for your time.
